body:
Hey Amara, following up on our conversation about [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) and the climate infrastructure space more broadly — I've been thinking a lot about what you said regarding the Series-A pipeline and I think there's real room for [a16z](a16z) to co-lead on one or two of those deals if the timing aligns. We've been increasingly active in grid-edge software and carbon accounting infrastructure, so the overlap with your thesis feels pretty natural. Would love to find 30 minutes this week or next to dig into specifics — I have a few founders I've been tracking who might be worth a warm intro if you're not already in their cap tables. Let me know what works on your end.

— Marcus
